props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the icon will be announced by screen readers.

props.name: fillColor
props.description: Sets a custom fill color for the icon. Accepts any valid CSS color value.

props.name: inverted
props.description: When true, inverts the icon colors for use on dark backgrounds.

props.name: opacity
props.description: Sets the opacity of the icon from 0 (transparent) to 1 (opaque).

props.name: role
props.description: Sets the ARIA role for the icon. Use 'presentation' for decorative icons.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the icon. Accepts numeric (1-6) or named sizes.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: theme
props.description: Sets the icon theme. 'outline' shows stroked icons, 'filled' shows solid icons.

props.name: title
props.description: Adds an accessible title to the icon SVG. Used by screen readers.

props.name: type
props.description: The icon type to display. See GoabIconType for available icons.

props.name: mb
props.description: Sets the bottom margin spacing token.

props.name: ml
props.description: Sets the left margin spacing token.

props.name: mr
props.description: Sets the right margin spacing token.

props.name: mt
props.description: Sets the top margin spacing token.

props.name: ariacontrols
props.description: Identifies the element(s) whose contents or presence are controlled by this icon.

props.name: ariaexpanded
props.description: Indicates whether the element controlled by this icon is expanded or collapsed.

props.name: arialabel
props.description: Defines how the icon will be announced by screen readers.

props.name: fillcolor
props.description: Sets a custom fill color for the icon. Accepts any valid CSS color value.

props.name: inverted
props.description: When true, inverts the icon colors for use on dark backgrounds.

props.name: mb
props.description: Bottom margin.

props.name: ml
props.description: Left margin.

props.name: mr
props.description: Right margin.

props.name: mt
props.description: Top margin.

props.name: opacity
props.description: Sets the opacity of the icon from 0 (transparent) to 1 (opaque).

props.name: role
props.description: Sets the ARIA role for the icon. Defaults to 'img'. Use 'presentation' for decorative icons.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the icon. Accepts numeric (1-6) or named sizes.

props.name: testid
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.description: Sets the icon theme. 'outline' shows stroked icons, 'filled' shows solid icons.
